comment: Versioned FIPS catalogue. Maintained as a data file so adding a recognised toolchain variant or non-FIPS algorithm is a one-line edit, never a code change. Sources: BoringCrypto Go docs, Microsoft Go FIPS notes (microsoft.com/openatmicrosoft/go), Red Hat go-toolset/OpenSSL release notes, AWS Go FIPS docs. The toolchain detector matches each pattern against the raw toolchain string read from go.mod / runtime/debug.BuildInfo (GoVersion). Non-FIPS algorithm packages: an import of any path below classifies as a deviation.
